_comment: TASK-7.7 5b-2d frozen genesis vector for the pq-agent-keystore-v1 unseal-at-boot loader (boot_agent_keystore). TEST KEYS ONLY — never a production keystore. Re-mint via `cargo test --features agent-gateway,lab-agent-keystore-from-file regen_agent_genesis_golden_vector -- --ignored --nocapture` and re-mint this sidecar in the SAME commit on any deliberate format_version / body-layout change; the agent_genesis_golden_sidecar_matches_blob test fails CI if blob_sha256 / blob_len_bytes here drift from the committed .sealed.bin.
blob_file_name_note: the `_v2` suffix is the historical FIXTURE name; the blob is now keystore_format_version 3 (TASK-15 15-2b added FaucetState.cumulative_signing_budget). The filename is kept to avoid churning every include_bytes! path; the format version is the field below + the header bytes [0x00,0x03].

seal_inputs.enclave_measurement_note: AGENT_KEYSTORE_BOOT_PLACEHOLDER_MEASUREMENT — DISTINCT from the producer placeholder; the real attested 48-byte SNP launch measurement is a deferred production obligation, NOT a placeholder.

invariants: strict_recovery_counter present (no serde default) — a body missing it fails CBOR decode

faucet.cumulative_signing_budget present (format_version 3, no serde default) — a structural config cap, NOT a marks surface (absent from encode_marks_payload); genesis = 00 x32 (no dispensing until a budget is configured)
deterministic CBOR (declaration-order, all Vec, no maps) + fixed nonce => byte-stable
blob_len <= MAX_KEYSTORE_BLOB_SIZE so the keystore stays re-installable over vsock
